title: antirrhinum majus subsp. meonanthum
intro: Antirrhinum majus subsp. meonanthum, also known as the DownySnapdragon, is a subspecies of the common Snapdragon (Antirrhinum majus) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus subsp. meonanthum include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
